title: TypeScript Patterns for Large Codebases
excerpt: Battle-tested patterns for scaling TypeScript applications beyond 100k lines. Learn how to maintain type safety and developer velocity as your codebase grows.

title: Mastering Mobile App State Management: A Pragmatic Guide
excerpt: Navigate the complex world of mobile app state management with proven strategies and patterns that scale. Learn how to build robust, maintainable mobile applications with clean state architecture.

title: Edge Functions: The Future of Serverless Architecture
excerpt: Discover how edge functions revolutionize serverless computing by bringing computation closer to users. Learn practical strategies for implementing ultra-low-latency, globally distributed applications.
